title: Skyfront Couriers
synopsis: A non-anime structured source used to prove the ingest path works for any reviewed fictional world. Couriers in a floating harbor must recover route tokens, repair a signal mast, and expose a pirate false alarm before trade shuts down.

locations.name: Harbor Ring
locations.description: A circular dock suspended above the cloudline.

locations.name: Signal Mast
locations.description: A creaking tower where route lamps are maintained.

locations.name: Rookery Deck
locations.description: Nest platforms and quiet ledges used by courier birds.

locations.name: Guild Counter
locations.description: The public desk where route claims are validated.

locations.name: Chain Bridge
locations.description: A swinging bridge where false pirate flags have appeared.

locations.name: Cloud Engine
locations.description: A hot machine bay below the harbor ring.

characters.name: Mara
characters.description: A practical captain trying to keep routes open without causing panic.
goals: recover the missing route token before the noon run
memories: A route token vanished near the Signal Mast after sunrise.

characters.name: Ivo
characters.description: A careful mechanic who needs a prism gear to restart the route lamps.
goals: recover a prism gear from the Cloud Engine
memories: A prism gear fell into the Cloud Engine during a false alarm.

characters.name: Nell
characters.description: A witness who needs proof before accusing anyone of piracy.
goals: collect proof from the Chain Bridge
memories: A painted pirate flag was seen near the Chain Bridge.

characters.name: Orric
characters.description: A sharp-eyed weather reader who notices when panic moves faster than storms.
goals: spot whether the storm warning is real
memories: The cloud pressure is normal; the pirate alarm feels staged.

characters.name: Vex
characters.description: A theatrical saboteur painting pirate signs to redirect cargo.
goals: force the guild to close the Chain Bridge
secrets: Vex painted the pirate flag at the Chain Bridge.
memories: Painted flags work best when witnesses panic before checking the bridge.

conflicts.title: A false pirate alarm threatens the harbor route
conflicts.objective: Raise panic with painted pirate signs and close the bridge before proof is gathered.
conflicts.clue: Fresh paint on the Chain Bridge flag points back toward the Harbor Ring.

artifacts.name: Route token
artifacts.description: A brass token that opens the noon courier route.
artifacts.clue: The token slid under the signal crank.

artifacts.name: Prism gear
artifacts.description: A glass gear needed to restart route lamps.
artifacts.clue: The gear fell during the false alarm.

artifacts.name: Painted flag scrap
artifacts.description: A torn pirate flag scrap with fresh paint.

artifacts.name: False alarm note
artifacts.description: A note timing the panic with cargo movement.
artifacts.clue: The note redirects cargo away from the guild counter.

artifacts.name: Guild radio
artifacts.description: A route radio used to confirm bridge closures.
artifacts.clue: The radio needs proof before closing the route.
